description_long: This is a classic four-door sedan with a boxy, angular design and a dark blue exterior. The car features a roof rack with metal bars, black side mirrors, and black wheels. Chrome trim accents the windows and door handles, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise subdued color scheme. The front end is equipped with rectangular headlights and a simple grille, while the rear displays rectangular taillights and a visible license plate. The windows are tinted dark, and the overall build suggests a sturdy, utilitarian vehicle typical of late 20th-century sedans.
description: A dark blue, boxy four-door sedan with a roof rack, black wheels, and chrome trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular headlights, grille, and windshield wipers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, roof rack, and black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the trunk, rectangular taillights, and a visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, roof rack, and wheels.
attribute_license_plate: Rear license plate present, rectangular, dark with some unreadable text.
attribute_wheel_design: Black wheels with a solid, simple design and no visible spokes.
